sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82131" key="periskufi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περισκῠφίζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σκύφος</etym>) <sense id="n82131.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make an incision round the scalp</tr_> :—hence <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περισκῠθ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.56</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.),<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">93</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.7</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑπο</ref> </xr>-).</sense> </entryFree>
